zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de CONDÉ於大約1130年出生在羅曼 艾皮爾時，他的父親Wedric de Condé27歲，母親Mahaut de Fontaine22歲。他於1164年與Alix de MONS在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1218年在他的家鄉享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de CONDÉ于大约1130年出生在羅曼 艾皮爾时，他的父亲Wedric de Condé27岁，母亲Mahaut de Fontaine22岁。他于1164年与Alix de MONS在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1218年在他的家乡享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CONDÉ
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Manuel, Luis, Juan, Pedro, Raul, Jorge, Ruben, Angel, Cesar, Fernando.  Portuguese Goncalo, Manoel.
Spanish and Portuguese: nickname from the title of rank conde ‘count’, a derivative of Latin comes, comitis ‘companion’. See Conte .
English (Shropshire): variant of Cundy , a cognate of 3 below, or Cound, a habitational name from Cound in Shropshire.

variants.name: Conte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Angelo, Salvatore, Antonio, Rocco, Carmine, Pasquale, Luigi, Silvio, Silverio, Giuseppe, Sal, Alfonso, Biagio, Carlo, Emilio, Fernando, Gerardo.

Italian: from the title of rank conte ‘count’, from Latin comes, genitive comitis ‘companion’. Probably in this sense (and in the Late Latin sense of ‘traveling companion’), it was a medieval personal name. As a title it was no doubt applied ironically as a nickname for someone with airs and graces or simply as a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a count. Compare Lo Conte .
Spanish: variant of   Conde   ‘count’ (see also 1 above).

variants.name: Candee
meanings: Americanized form of French Condé (see Conde ) or, alternatively, Candé, a habitational name from Candé in Maine-et-Loire, or from Candé-sur-Beauvron in Loire-et-Cher, or southern French Condy .
Alternatively, perhaps an altered form of English Condy , a cognate of the name Candé in 1 above.

History: The Candees trace their origin to Zaccheus Cande(e), who in the middle of the 17th century resided in the New Haven County, CT, and his probable father John Condy alias Conde. The name of the latter is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors as Jean/John Candée/Cande/Condé and in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America as John Conde. See also   Conde  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de CONDÉ was born about 1130, in Roman Empire, his father, Wedric de Condé, was 27 and his mother, Mahaut de Fontaine, was 22. He married Alix de MONS in 1164, in Holy Roman Empire. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1218, in his hometown, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de CONDÉ est né environ 1130, à Roman Empire, son père, Wedric de Condé, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mahaut de Fontaine, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alix de MONS en 1164, à Saint-Empire romain. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1218, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de CONDÉ um 1130 in Roman Empire geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wedric de Condé 27 und seine Mutter Mahaut de Fontaine 22. Er hat 1164 in Heiliges Römisches Reich Alix de MONS geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1218 im Alter von 90 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de CONDÉ è nato il circa 1130 nel Roman Empire, il suo padre, Wedric de Condé, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mahaut de Fontaine, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alix de MONS nel 1164, nel Heiliges Römisches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1218, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de CONDÉが約1130年にロマン エンパアーで生まれた時，父Wedric de Condéは27歳，母Mahaut de Fontaineは22歳であった。1164年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチでAlix de MONSと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1218年に故郷で90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de CONDÉ(이)가 대략 1130년 로먼 피르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wedric de Condé(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mahaut de Fontaine(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1164년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 Alix de MONS(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1218년 그의 고향에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1130–about 1218: tany ho any amin'ny 1130–tany ho any amin'ny 1218

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de CONDÉ nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Roman Empire, seu pai, Wedric de Condé, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut de Fontaine, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de MONS em 1164, em Heiliges Römisches Reich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1218, em sua cidade natal, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de CONDÉ родился около 1130 г. в местности роман эмпир, его отцу по имени Wedric de Condé было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut de Fontaine, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de MONS в 1164 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1218 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 90 лет.

sm.about 1130–about 1218: e tusa o le 1130–e tusa o le 1218

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de CONDÉ nació aproximadamente 1130, en Roman Empire, su papá, Wedric de Condé, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mahaut de Fontaine, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alix de MONS en 1164, en Heiliges Römisches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1218, en su pueblo, a la edad de 90 años.
